case: Held overnight for a broken tail-light.
Accused of armed robbery, caught fleeing scene.
Elderly witness forgot court date.
Repeat shoplifter with three prior convictions.
Student arrested at a peaceful protest.
Suspected fraud, passport seized, no ties abroad.
Domestic assault, victim afraid to return home.
Unpaid parking tickets only.
Caught with a small amount of a banned substance, first offence.
Alleged kidnapping, large sum of cash found.
reason: Serious charge plus evidence of flight risk.

case: Contempt of court for yawning loudly.
reason: Contempt can be fined, not jailed.

case: Accused of arson with prior fire-related charges.
Held for 48 hours without any charge filed.
Accused murderer caught on video, no alibi.
Journalist jailed for refusing to reveal a source.
reason: Protecting sources is not a jailable offense here.

case: Held on a bench warrant for missing a fine payment.
reason: Administrative lapse, no danger to public.

case: Suspected serial burglar with tools found in vehicle.
reason: Pattern of break-ins, tools indicate intent.

case: Detained at airport after name matched a watch list, no other evidence.
reason: Name match alone is insufficient grounds.

case: Accused of embezzlement, has offshore accounts and private jet.
First-time offender caught shoplifting baby formula.
reason: Necessity item, first offence, no violence.

case: Held for public intoxication, already sober by morning.
Gang member arrested with loaded firearm near school.
Accused of reckless driving, no injuries, license surrendered.
Held on decade-old warrant for unpaid child support, now employed.
reason: Old warrant, currently employed and able to pay.

case: Terror suspect with bomb-making manuals and surveillance photos.
reason: Clear evidence of planned mass harm.

case: Picked up for loitering, no other charges, homeless.
reason: No crime beyond status, no danger.

case: Accused rapist, victim identified them in lineup.
Held for failing to pay a civil judgment debt.
Caught driving with suspended license, third time this year.
Detained without access to a lawyer for 72 hours.
reason: Due process violation, right to counsel denied.
